notes: enjoy a half day of local coastal fishing. we will be searching for a variety of game fish, including , bass, sculpin, whitefish & sanddabs. galley and restrooms on board. food & drink is available for purchase during the trip. - fishing license required for anyone 16 years or older. license and rod rentals are extra. 60yo & older = senior - 15yo & younger = junior - these items are not permitted on board! alcohol, coolers, drugs & glass - smoking nicotine (cigarettes/e-cigarettes) is allowed - crew may search bags before boarding, please do not bring non-permitted items.

notes: ultra limited load. travel up to 40mph to the fishing grounds on a high performance and meticulously maintained 2025 36 foot yellowfin center console. fishing for tuna and yellowtail either offshore or at the coronado islands depending on current conditions. all bait, fuel, tackle, ice, and fish cleaning included. all shimano reels and gloomis rods provided. just bring your own food, drink, fishing license, and layered clothing. passport required.
